ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the challenge belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the challenge (e.g., Baby's First 24) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge (e.g., smashme) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the challenge */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Point value of the challenge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was created */,
  "starts_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge starts */,
  "ends_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge ends */,
  "max_submissions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of submissions allowed per participant */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the challenge is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., skill, tool, knowledge) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_requirements_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the participant's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., participant, challenge_creator, administrator) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the participant's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_skills" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "skill_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the submission is for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the submission */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Solution submitted by the participant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the comment is for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_comments_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participants" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant joined the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the message is related to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who received the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_messages_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the notification is for */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the notification is related to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new_challenge, new_comment, submission_status_update) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the leaderboard entry is for */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the participant in the challenge */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the analytics entry is for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the analytics entry is for */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., challenge_view, submission, comment) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data related to the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
